title: Happy Hour: $6 Cocktails & Half-Off Small Plates
description: Weekday happy hour 4–7 PM. $6 house cocktails, $4 draft beers, and 50% off the entire small plates menu including oysters, charcuterie, and truffle fries.

title: Lunch Special: Dim Sum Set for Two — $38
description: Premium dim sum lunch set for two. Includes 6 rotating dishes, house tea service, and complimentary egg tarts. Available weekdays 11 AM–2:30 PM.

title: Happy Hour All Night Sunday: $5 Natural Wine
description: Every Sunday, all-night happy hour at the bar. $5 pours from the natural wine list, $8 cheese plates, and $4 house beer on draft.

title: Lunch Special: Ramen + Gyoza Set — $18
description: Weekday lunch set: signature tonkotsu ramen with your choice of toppings plus 4-piece pan-fried gyoza. Available Monday–Friday until 3 PM.

title: Happy Hour: Buy 2 Cocktails, Get 1 Free
description: Rooftop happy hour every weekday 4–7 PM. Buy any two cocktails from the signature menu and the third is on us. $6 draft beers also available.

title: Lunch Special: 3-Course French Bistro — $28
description: Three-course lunch: choice of soup or salad, one main (steak frites, moules, or croque monsieur), and dessert. Monday–Friday 11:30 AM–2:30 PM.

title: Happy Hour: $4 Drafts & $5 Margaritas
description: Daily happy hour on the patio 3–7 PM. $4 house draft beers, $5 classic margaritas, $6 signature cocktails. Complimentary chips and house-made salsa.

title: Lunch Special: Taco Plate + Agua Fresca — $11
description: Three handmade tacos (choice of carne asada, carnitas, or veggie) with a fresh agua fresca. Made to order daily 11 AM–3 PM.

title: Happy Hour: $8 Cocktails at the Oyster Bar
description: Tuesday through Friday 5–7 PM at the oyster bar. $8 craft cocktails, $2 oysters on the half shell, and $5 glasses of Muscadet.

title: Lunch Special: BBQ Plate $12 All-In
description: Choice of two meats (brisket, pulled pork, or sausage), two classic sides, and a slice of white bread. Served weekdays from 11 AM until sold out.

title: Happy Hour: $5 House Wine & $6 Bar Snacks
description: Weekday happy hour 5–7 PM. All house wines by the glass $5, curated bar snacks $6 each including whipped ricotta toast, spiced nuts, and marinated olives.

title: Lunch Special: Bao Set — $15
description: Three filled bao (rotating daily — pork belly, chicken karaage, or mushroom), house pickles, and a soft drink or iced tea. Weekdays noon–2:30 PM.

title: Happy Hour: $6 Negronis & $4 Beers
description: Monday–Friday 5–8 PM. $6 negronis, $6 spritzes, $4 peroni drafts. Paired with complimentary bruschetta while supplies last.

title: Lunch Special: Sushi Bento Box — $22
description: Bento box includes 6-piece nigiri, California roll, miso soup, edamame, and a small house salad. Available weekdays 11:30 AM–2 PM. Dine-in only.

title: Happy Hour: Half-Price Craft Beer Flights
description: Every day 3–6 PM. 4-pour craft beer flight at half price. Rotating taps from local breweries. Add a pretzel or cheese board for $6.

title: Lunch Special: Pho + Spring Rolls — $16
description: Large bowl of pho (chicken, beef, or tofu) plus two fresh spring rolls. Comes with all the traditional fixings. Weekdays only, limited to 30 orders daily.

title: Happy Hour: $7 Signature Cocktails
description: Wednesday–Saturday 4–6 PM. All signature cocktails $7, normally $16–$18. Full bar menu available. No minimum.

title: Lunch Special: Burger + Fries + Drink — $17
description: Classic smash burger (single or double), fresh-cut fries, and a fountain drink or iced tea. Upgrade to a shake for $3. Dine-in weekdays 11 AM–4 PM.

title: Happy Hour: $5 Sparkling & $6 Snacks
description: Friday happy hour 5–8 PM. Prosecco and cava pours $5, rotating snack plates $6 each. Perfect for a post-work wind-down.

title: Lunch Special: Wood-Fired Pizza + Salad — $20
description: Any 10-inch wood-fired pizza from the lunch menu plus a house or caesar salad. Includes sparkling or still water. Dine-in only, Monday–Friday noon–3 PM.
